item.title: Just enjoying the silent show.
item.description: I removed the audio because it was just a song and it takes away from what the dog is experiencing silently.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Boys & Girls both need emotional guidance growing up
item.description: If you're not growing on your own emotional intelligence journey, how can you possibly help a young person? Abuse is terrible & the worst. Full stop. Get help. Manipulation is almost as bad .. because they don't develop their own emotional wellness and independence. Leaving them open for others to manipulate later. Ignoring / negligence is almost as bad .. because other influences at random may be equally destructive long term. The ONLY answer is to take responsibility because they are YOUR children. And the responsibility is to get over your own fears, emotional growth and other challenges. Get involved and worry about perfection later!! They need you. ------------------------------------------------------------- Post FP Edit: Thank you for the Accolade Awards and the many positive and thought-provoking responses to everyone. In this post I found VERY few truly negative comments which is unusual. I'm thankful for this result from you guys too. Awesome! Very little name calling. A lot of empathic outreach. Yay! The one thing I didn't see was anyone re-affirming the need for their own emotional intelligence to grow. No one really seemed to re-commit themselves publically to their responsibility either. A lot of comments about other people. Which is fine. No one seemed to ask "how do I do that?" Instead, a lot of opinions about how things are how how they should be. Some purely academic or objective-sounding philosophical or political thoughts. Some opinions about horrific personal history (I'm so sorry!!). But very few people willing to talk about their own responsibility or emotional growth. That's too bad. It was really the main point of my text. I want to repeat this part: The ONLY answer is to take responsibility. At 54, I'm still on a journey of self-discovery. I hope my children (now 24, 21, 13 & 10) receive the benefits of my journey. I am responsible. THANKS ALL!! Cheers!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.dc:creator: cinnabarra

item.title: 35 years deserves 12 layers
item.description:
Bought myself a ridiculous extravagant cake for my birthday because WHY NOT?! Caramel 12 layer cake... HEAVENLY. I have so much cake left...
Cat tax: black toe beans Of course imgurians love cake! Thanks for the birthday love! I bought my cake from a local bakery called Flirt with Dessert on Wilmington Island, Georgia for those inquiring minds... www.flirtwithdessert.com DO order yourself the most ridiculous cake from a local Bakery for your next birthday. It feels AWESOME. 10 stars. Cheers, friends! Stay weird, imgur.
item.dc:creator: EnigmaWearingHeels

item.title: Get off my lawn!
item.description: USA, California: Sea lions chasing people at a beach in San Diego! Lifeguards were on standby in the water ensuring no one was hurt. It's recommended people stay at least 50 ft away from sea lions.
item.dc:creator: WakeUp2Yourself

item.title: Oh dear God in Kyrgyzstan glacier collapse ￼Juuka Gorge
item.description:
This isn’t snow in an avalanche this is ice that used to be a PERMANENT feature. This happened only in the last day or so.
If you’re wondering why they didn’t realise the danger or move.
Living every day truly feeling life is good, is worth fighting for sending love for everyone. Nothing is impossible.
